selection_rule: Use mean absolute band-wise MTF signed relative error as tie-break 1.
Keep gray only as a diagnostic non-parity control.

recommended_candidate.name: demosaic_red
recommended_candidate.reason: Best parity-valid candidate under the current analysis frame.

candidate.name: gray
candidate.rationale: Diagnostic grayscale control; kept to show why a non-R path should not be used for parity fitting.

candidate.name: demosaic_red
candidate.rationale: Current release/workaround R-channel path from full Bayer demosaic, then red-plane extraction.

candidate.name: raw_red_upsampled
candidate.rationale: R-only raw subsampling path with bilinear upsampling back to full image size.
